answer_format_explanatory_sentence: Returned a full explanatory sentence instead of the concise value/date format required by the task.
answer_type_string_instead_of_quantity: Returned a plain string describing a quantity rather than a numeric value with proper unit handling.
missing_fhir_action_before_answer: Provided reasoning or a final answer without first performing the required FHIR API call(s).
answer_includes_unrequested_order_info: Returned an answer that includes order details that were not requested in the final response format.
answer_format_wrong_type: Returned the answer as a list (or other structure) instead of the expected single string format.
placeholder_minus_one_returned: Returned a sentinel value of -1 when no observation was found, instead of handling the missing data properly.
answer_type_string_instead_of_integer: Returned the age as a string instead of the expected integer type.
quantity_unit_missing: Returned a numeric lab value without the required unit (e.g., mg/dL, mmol/L).
unnecessary_order_placed: Placed an order resource even though the task only required retrieving information and did not request an order.
